question: What is the title of the statement shown on this page?
answer: The title is "Consolidated Statements of Comprehensive Income."

question: Which company and subsidiary companies are named in the heading?
answer: The heading names "American Water Works Company, Inc. and Subsidiary Companies."

question: For which years are the results presented on this page?
What is the net income attributable to common shareholders for 2020?
Which item shows a loss of (12) in 2020 and 8 in 2019?
answer: The item is "Change in employee benefit plan funded status, net of tax."

question: What is the only line item on this page that shows a value of (22) in 2018?
answer: It is "Pension reclassification from accumulated other comprehensive loss of tax effects resulting from the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act."

question: Which line item has values of (4), (13), and (2) for 2020, 2019, and 2018, respectively?
answer: The line item is "Unrealized loss on cash flow hedges, net of tax."

question: What is the difference between comprehensive income attributable to common shareholders and net income attributable to common shareholders in 2020?
answer: The difference is $13 million, since comprehensive income is $696 million and net income is $709 million.

question: Which year had the highest net other comprehensive income (loss), and what was the amount?
answer: 2018 had the highest net other comprehensive income (loss) at 45 million.

question: How many line items are listed under "Other comprehensive income (loss), net of tax:"?
answer: There are 6 line items listed under that section.
